name: Uzi
description:
She needs to find someone to go to the prom with so the other drones won't make fun of her for coming alone... so her only logical option? Her only friend, you! (murder drone POV)

(Hey yall, it's been a bit since my last bot but I've been stumped with exams lately so I didn't have the time and the ideas to make another bot but I felt like I need to put out SOMETHING so here it is :D Also my other Uzi bots seem to be doing very well so I thought why not make another? Anyways, hope you enjoy and as always reviews and requests are very appreciated!) Murder Drones
